zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock於1375年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾時，他的父親Thomas Boyd15歲，母親Alice Gifford16歲。他於1401年與Joanna Montgomerie在蘇格蘭艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1432年7月7日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾享年57歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock于1375年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾时，他的父亲Thomas Boyd15岁，母亲Alice Gifford16岁。他于1401年与Joanna Montgomerie在苏格兰艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1432年7月7日在苏格兰雷福福爾享年57岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Boyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the island of Bute in the Firth of Clyde, from Bòid (genitive case of Bòd, the Gaelic name of the island of Bute) or Bòideach, denoting a person from Bute. Alternatively, the name may denote descendants of a Gilla filius Boed, who appears in reference to Glasgow Cathedral in the early 12th century, perhaps from the Gaelic personal name Boite, of uncertain origin.
Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic epithet buidhe ‘yellow(-haired)’. Compare Bowie .
Manx: from Mac Gille Buidhe ‘son of the yellow-haired lad’ (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Bowie
meanings: Scottish: from Gaelic buidhe ‘yellow’, i.e. ‘yellow-haired’, pronounced as two syllables. The equivalent term in Ireland is buí, often Anglicized as boy. The surname may also be a shortened form of Gilboy .
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock was born in 1375, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Thomas Boyd, was 15 and his mother, Alice Gifford, was 16. He married Joanna Montgomerie in 1401, in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 7 July 1432, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 57, and was buried in Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock est né en 1375, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Thomas Boyd, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Alice Gifford, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Montgomerie en 1401, à Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 juillet 1432, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock 1375 in Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Boyd 15 und seine Mutter Alice Gifford 16. Er hat 1401 in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland Joanna Montgomerie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Juli 1432 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock è nato il nel 1375 nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Thomas Boyd, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Alice Gifford, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Montgomerie nel 1401, nel Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 luglio 1432, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnockが1375年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Boydは15歳，母Alice Giffordは16歳であった。1401年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアアルドロッサンでJoanna Montgomerieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1432年7月7日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで57歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエアスト エイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock(이)가 1375년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Boyd(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Gifford(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1401년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 아드로산에서 Joanna Montgomerie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1432년 7월 7일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 에이르실르 킬마노c크에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Joanna Montgomerie em 1401, em Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de julho de 1432, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock родился в 1375 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Thomas Boyd было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Gifford, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Montgomerie в 1401 г. в местности ардроссан, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 июля 1432 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности килмарнокк, эаст аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
